description: A draggable handle component for resizing adjacent elements

properties.name: customClass
properties.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the handle element.

properties.name: leftTarget
properties.description: The left target element to resize (CSS selector or HTMLElement)

properties.name: rightTarget
properties.description: The right target element to resize (CSS selector or HTMLElement)

properties.name: density
properties.description: The density/spacing of the handle container (compact: 8px, comfortable: 12px, relaxed: 16px).

properties.name: defaultSplit
properties.description: The initial split percentage for the left/top panel (1-100). The right/bottom panel gets the remaining percentage.

properties.name: type
properties.description: The type of handle to display.
